title: adiantaceae
intro: The Adiantaceae rank, also known as the maidenhair fern family, is a family of plants that consists of approximately 40 genera and over 1,000 species. It is characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and often found in shaded, moist environments. The Adiantaceae family is known for its diversity and widespread distribution across the globe, with many species being native to tropical and subtropical regions. Some species within this family are highly prized for their ornamental value, adding to their popularity among horticulturists and botanists.
